calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Discharged

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, June 16, 2016 in Department 525:
Brendan Quinlan, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
John Paxton, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Respondent, Brendan Quinlan testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - various exhibits - copy of payment statement; 12/18/2014, 1/14/2015, & 1/13/15 e-mails, etc.

Appellant, John Paxton testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - Various exhibits package marked A-L; Notice of Violation by Dept. of Building Inspection.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk Jean Kong; Matter Not Reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-13-2016 Continued To Jun-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Continued To Mar-25-16 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
